objects.description: [ANELLDR](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9027) was used in [Operation AkaiRyū](https://attack.mitre.org/campaigns/C0060) as part of [UPPERCUT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S0275) infection chains.(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha Anel NOV 2024)(Citation: ESET MirrorFace 2025)
